pageContext.name: Belle and Beast Light Up
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Enesco are excited to present the Belle and Beast Light Up Figurine!  Standing at 9' tall, graceful Belle is in the yellow dress she is known for and the Beast wears his blue coat. They are both seen dancing in front of a glass stained window from the Beast's castle.  This Disney collectible has LED lights and requires three (3) AAA batteries.  Disney fans, don't miss your chance to add this Beauty and the Beast figurine to your Disney collection today!
